findings.description: Chart graphic is fragmented and broken.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, Figure 48.1 is a cohesive bar and line chart. In the HTML, this chart is broken into several overlapping, vertical image fragments, making the graphic completely illegible.

findings.description: Text from the chart is extracted out of context.
findings.evidence: The text elements originally contained within the chart in the PDF (such as axis labels, data point values, and legend text) have been extracted and placed as a long, unstructured vertical list at the very bottom of the HTML page, destroying the layout and context.
